judgment.summary: Fast-growing software company with strong cash flow but currently unprofitable on a GAAP basis.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 12.1%; next earnings 2026-05-28.
positives: Revenue growth 26.7% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Free cash flow $463.32M TTM — positive cash generation.
Consensus buy rating from 36 analysts with a mean target of $358.82.
negatives: Profit margin -2.9% and operating margin 0.0% — not yet GAAP profitable.
Return on equity -2.5% and return on assets -2.4% — negative returns on capital.
Debt/Equity 2.13 — leverage is on the higher side.

news.paragraph: MongoDB (MDB) is seen as well-positioned in the database market with durable growth potential, according to BMO Capital. This positive analyst commentary comes just ahead of the company's next earnings report, which is scheduled for May 28th. Traders should consider the analyst's view alongside the upcoming earnings catalyst and the stock's current valuation.

headlines.title: MongoDB (MDB) Remains Well-Positioned In The Database Market And Has Durable Growth Potential, Says BMO Capital
